name: docx_search
description: Find text in the document and get matching anchors with snippets and surrounding context — never the whole document. Matching runs on coalesced text, so a query split across runs in the XML still hits. Use this to locate targets before docx_read or any edit tool.

regex.description: Treat query as a regular expression.

scope.description: Story name ('body', 'footnotes', 'comments', 'headers', 'footers') or paragraph range like 'P10..P24'.
